data.title: Emdoor Digital Shines at the 139th Canton Fair with AI Hard-Core Technology, Defining a New Vision for Future Smart Living
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, Emdoor Digital participated in the Canton Fair from April 15th to 19th, 2026, unveiling an innovative range of products. The showcased lineup included cutting-edge AI laptops, e-ink tablets dedicated to eye-care, and smart terminals. This demonstration garnered significant attention and praise at the event.

data.title: Orthogon Therapeutics Raises an Additional $11M Financing for Its BK Virus Antiviral Drug Program
data.description: In Canton, Massachusetts, Orthogon Therapeutics has recently completed a follow-on financing round, securing $11 million. This brings their total capital raised to $36 million. The funding will be utilized to further develop their groundbreaking drug aimed at combating BK polyomavirus, a significant source of complications in transplant recipients. Presently, there are no approved treatments for BK virus infections. The company is at the forefront of creating an oral therapy designed to tackle the complete range of BK infection, starting from early reactivation.

data.title: Hexagon Composites ASA: Annual Report 2025
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 17, 2026, the Board of Directors of Hexagon Composites ASA has given their approval for the company's Annual Report 2025, encompassing sustainability declarations. Included in the decision are essential documents: Hexagon Composites' Annual Report 2025 in the European Single.

data.title: Hardware Security Modules Market Outlook 2026-2031: 10.02% CAGR Growth Driven by Increasing Cybersecurity Investments and Secure Key Management Needs, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of April 17, 2026, the hardware security modules market was worth $1.98 billion in 2025. The market is estimated to increase from $2.18 billion in 2026 to $3.51 billion by 2031, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.02%, as per the latest report by Mordor Intelligence.

data.title: AI Meets Everest: AIVEREST Brings Five Exoskeletons for Their European Debut at Hannover Messe
data.description: In Hannover, Germany on April 17, 2026, an award-winning exoskeleton brand hailing from China, AIVEREST, is set to showcase its products at Hannover Messe 2026 in Booth C10, Hall 26. The brand's name signifies a fusion between AI technology and the adventurous spirit associated with Everest, symbolizing a commitment to surpassing boundaries and ascending to greater heights. The dedicated team behind AIVEREST dedicated two years to develop this innovative exoskeleton.

data.title: Returning Customers Appreciate Quick Import Feature with Unique 2025 ezW2Correction Software
data.description: The recently released 2025 ezW2Correction software in REDMOND, Wash. on April 17, 2026, offers enhanced data import features for new and existing customers. Developed by Halfpricesoft.com, the software prioritizes customer productivity. This update supports flexibility in importing data, catering to a wide range of user needs.

data.title: Hackers Pull Back the Curtain in Kansas
data.description: A forthcoming event, OzCon set to take place in Overland Park, Kansas on May 18, 2026, will shine a spotlight on the escalating threat landscape. Attackers continue to evolve, becoming more strategic and elusive, making traditional defense mechanisms insufficient. OzCon aims to address these challenges by advocating for a shift in defensive strategies. The event will focus on exposing real attack methods, tactics, and strategies that defenders often overlook. By emphasizing proactive measures over reactive responses, OzCon seeks to equip participants with the knowledge and tools needed to effectively combat modern threats. Attendees can expect insights into cutting-edge approaches to cybersecurity, with an emphasis on intelligence-led defense strategies.

data.title: Metro Supply Chain to join NX Group to accelerate global growth while maintaining its strong Canadian roots
data.description: This morning, Metro Supply Chain Inc. revealed that its majority shareholder, LDC Metro Holdings Inc. ("LDC"), in conjunction with La Caisse, has finalized a deal to sell Metro Supply Chain to Nippon Express Holdings Inc. ("NX Group"), an international company. This significant agreement marks a new chapter for Metro Supply Chain, showcasing the company's growth and expansion in the global market.

data.title: Invitation to telephone conference concerning Duni AB (publ) interim report 1 January - 31 March 2026
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, the interim report for Duni AB is set to be released to the media at 7:45 AM CET on Friday, April 24, 2026. Following this, a telephone conference will be held at 10:00 AM CET on the same day to present the report. This conference will provide an opportunity for stakeholders to discuss the company's financial status and performance.
